summary: Cross-host redirect handler also deletes x-rwgps-auth-token (not just x-rwgps-api-key).
reason: Two-header auth: generated redirect handler stripped only the primary header on a cross-host hop, leaking the sibling auth token to a redirect target (Greptile P1/security).
validated_outcome: go build + go vet clean; both x-rwgps-* headers deleted on cross-host redirect.
upstream_issue: generator: emit Header.Del for all auth headers in cross-host redirect strip
